PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-27-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number 292610 Estate of Donald P. Ryan.

Appearances: George Sullivan for William O'Brien.

Mr. Sullivan requested that both matters be taken off calendar, stated that an Executor had been appointed in Kevin Ryan's estate and that she should be the Successor Executor in these two cases. Both matters were taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA

Off Calendar Jul-07-2010 Continued To Jul-21-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

The matter was continued to July 21, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-14-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George Sullivan for Kevin Ryan (Petitioner).

The Court stated that there was no written opposition or objection and that no one appeared to object. Therefore, the Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court). Bond is not required.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith./J. Shannon.
